title: Windows Management Instrumentation (WMI) Queries
body: A library of Windows Management Instrumentation (WMI) queries.

title: Sockets Network Stream Example
body: A Client/Server NetworkStream application written in .NET 4.5.

title: HttpClient Examples
body: A project that demonstrates how to use the HttpClient (.NET Framework 4.6).

title: WinSCP Interop
body: An old WinSCP Interop example used to sign-in to secure FTP and update files.

title: Active Directory Examples
body: Active Directory examples translated from VB.NET.

title: VerbosLog
body: A simple event logger with verbosity, which makes it easier to debug service type applications.

title: Task Parallel Library Examples
body: Examples of how to use the task parallel library.

title: Concurrent Collection Examples
body: Examples of how to use the built-in concurrent collections.

title: File Compression Examples
body: Examples of how to use compression libraries, like IO.Compression, ICSharp, and IonicZip.

title: Filesystem Watcher
body: Examples of how to use filesystem watcher.

title: .NET Core 2 Web Api
body: An example project of a .NET Core 2 Web Api.

title: RyanCMS
body: A fully featured content management system written in PHP and Bootstrap 4 with ckeditor and Paypal integration.

title: Express Server with JWT
body: An Express Server with JSON Web Tokens (JWT).
